news.title: 🍨MUSIC AWARDS JAPAN🍨 AiScReam’s track “Ai♡Scream!” has been selected as an entry for MUSIC AWARDS JAPAN Best Global Hit from Japan category! The winner is decided by Spotify listeners around the world, so we’d love your support — vote on Spotify and help us win! 🔗https://spotify.link/MAJ_BestGlobalHitfromJapan Voting Period Round 1: Until April 8 (Wed) 23:59 JST @SpotifyJP #SpotifyxMAJ #MAJ2026 #lovelive
ご予約受付は明日まで📢 お見逃しなく！ #lovelive #Aqours
